channel.title: Saltmire Devlog
channel.description: Practical Godot 4 tutorials — game feel, saving, and shipping polish fast.

item.title: "Tween vs AnimationPlayer in Godot 4 — which to use and when"
item.description: Tween and AnimationPlayer both animate values in Godot 4, but they solve different problems. Here's a clear comparison table, real code for each, and a verdict so you pick the right tool the first time.

item.title: "Godot 4 hitbox and hurtbox the easy way (damage, teams, i-frames, knockback)"
item.description: How to build a clean hitbox/hurtbox system in Godot 4 with Area2D — collision layers and masks explained, plus damage, teams to stop friendly fire, invincibility frames and knockback, with copy-paste code.

item.title: "Fixing Godot 4 save-file load errors: JSON parse error, null instance, and missing files"
item.description: The three save/load errors that break Godot 4 games — JSON parse error at end of file, attempt to call on a null instance, and file not found — with the cause and the exact fix for each.

item.title: 5 Godot 4 scene transition effects (and how to build each one)
item.description: Fade, iris wipe, pixelate, slide, and dissolve — five working Godot 4 scene transition techniques with GDScript code you can drop in today.

item.title: How to save and load your game in Godot 4 (the honest way)
item.description: A complete, working save/load system in Godot 4 using FileAccess and JSON — plus the four production problems nobody warns you about.

item.title: Godot 4 screen shake and hit-stop in one script
item.description: Add punchy screen shake and hit-stop (freeze frames) to your Godot 4 game with a small, reusable Camera2D script — with tunable code you can paste in today.
